IonQ.rationale: Nudged growth from 0.45 to 0.44 to align with fresh 43.9% YoY.

Astera Labs.rationale: Lowered growth from 0.4 toward fresh 17.5% YoY, moderating for strong forward AI connectivity trajectory.

CoreWeave.rationale: unchanged: no fresh YoY provided; high-growth trajectory intact at $6bn TTM.

Palantir.rationale: Nudged down from 0.4 toward fresh 16.7% YoY, keeping premium for accelerating US commercial demand.

Lumentum.rationale: Nudged down from 0.4 toward fresh 18.2% YoY with datacom ramp support.

Applied Optoelectronics.rationale: Lowered from 0.35 toward fresh 11.3% YoY reflecting weaker realized trend.

Micron.rationale: Raised growth to 0.5 and earn_quality to 0.6 given strong 55.3% YoY memory upcycle, still cyclical.

AMD.rationale: Trimmed growth from 0.35 to 0.3 as fresh 8.1% YoY is soft, but forward AI GPU ramp keeps it elevated.

NVIDIA.rationale: unchanged: 17.4% TTM YoY reflects lag; forward datacenter demand supports 0.4.

Broadcom.rationale: Slightly lowered growth from 0.38 to 0.35; AI segment strong but blended TTM YoY is 10.5%.

Marvell.rationale: Nudged growth from 0.35 to 0.32 as fresh 6.4% YoY is weak, custom-silicon ramp keeps forward premium.

AppLovin.rationale: Nudged growth from 0.3 to 0.28 toward fresh 6.2% YoY.

Vertiv.rationale: unchanged: TTM YoY 6% lags but datacenter power backlog supports forward 0.28.

Coherent.rationale: unchanged: 4.9% YoY offset by datacom optics ramp.

Meta.rationale: Nudged growth from 0.18 to 0.16 toward fresh 6.1% YoY, keeping ad-AI upside.

Oracle.rationale: unchanged: 8.1% TTM YoY lags but OCI/cloud backlog supports forward 0.22.

Microsoft.rationale: unchanged: Azure AI growth supports 0.14 despite blended 4.2% TTM YoY.

Texas Instruments.rationale: Nudged growth from 0.14 to 0.13 in line with modest 6.1% YoY recovery.

Qualcomm.rationale: Nudged growth from 0.08 to 0.07 as fresh YoY is slightly negative.

Apple.rationale: unchanged: 3.6% YoY consistent with modest 0.07 growth outlook.

Cisco.rationale: unchanged: 2.4% YoY consistent with low single-digit growth.

Tesla.rationale: Nudged growth from 0.1 to 0.09 given weak 3.2% YoY, retaining AI/autonomy optionality.
